description.value:
A powerful natural weapon attack using the creature's body mass â€” a fist, foot, or whole body impact. Damage values are determined by the creature's stat block; RME properties apply on top of the creature's base attack.

Basic: Heavy, Natural, Melee, Brace, Disarm, Stagger

rmeData.masterPerk: If you move at least 20ft straight toward an enemy and hit with a slam attack in the same turn, that enemy must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be knocked prone and you can make an additional slam attack as a bonus action.
